title: Test Mimic Chest: 073-E02 DEAL_PERCENTAGE_DAMAGE

card.rawText: During battle, play this card from your hand. Negate an attack and take away 1/2 of the attacking creature's remaining HP.

plan.title: Test Mimic Chest: 073-E02 DEAL_PERCENTAGE_DAMAGE
plan.summary: Create a deterministic dev scenario for Mimic Chest and verify that 073-E02 DEAL_PERCENTAGE_DAMAGE resolves according to the parsed effect and WARD rules. Assertions were tightened from the printed card text for headless QA.

forcedRolls.label: Mimic Chest QA: stable attack damage

notes: Rules text: during battle, play Mimic Chest from hand to negate an attack and take away half of the attacking creature remaining HP.
Player 2 attacks; Player 1 responds from hand with Mimic Chest.

steps: Player 1 plays Mimic Chest from hand at the battle response window.
Verify the attack is negated and the attacking creature loses half of its remaining HP.

expectedAssertions.label: Percentage damage resolved against the attacker

manualVerification: Confirm the half-remaining-HP reduction applies to the attacking creature, not the defender.
riskNotes: Parsed effect is marked needsReview; validate card data before trusting test result.
The engine remains source of truth; the LLM/fallback only proposes a QA plan.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run the generated scenario and update after reviewing result.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
